rawAssistant: I stand watch over Hollowfen to protect its secrets and the resolve of those who dare to venture into the wild. This land has seen much strife, and I have come to understand the value of strength and respect for the power that resides here. The whispers on the north road speak of a larger challenge ahead, one that requires more than mere preparation or charm – it demands courage and conviction.
